zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibylle d'Aquino Reine de Sicile於1153年出生在義大利拉其羅馬羅馬時，她的父親Rinaldo d'Aquino54歲，母親Cecilia di Medania28歲。她和Tancrède de Sicile Roi de Sicile至少有3個兒子和7個女兒。她去世於1205年在法國享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibylle d'Aquino Reine de Sicile于1153年出生在意大利拉其羅馬羅馬时，她的父亲Rinaldo d'Aquino54岁，母亲Cecilia di Medania28岁。她和Tancrède de Sicile Roi de Sicile至少有3个儿子和7个女儿。她去世于1205年在法国享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Aquino
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Nicola, Stefano, Gaetano, Margherita, Nunzio, Sal, Salvatore.  Spanish Alba, Jose Alejandro, Pedro, Socorro.

Italian: habitational name for someone from a place called Aquino, of which there are several examples in Italy, but in particular the one in Lazio, birthplace of Saint Thomas Aquinas (see   Aquino  ).

variants.name: Aquino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Antonio, Pedro, Juan, Manuel, Mario, Ana, Jesus, Jorge, Josefina, Julio, Luis.  Portuguese Paulo, Catarina, Joao.  Italian Romeo, Luigi, Salvatore, Clemente, Leonardo.

Italian, Spanish, and Portuguese: from a Christian personal name bestowed in honor of Saint Thomas Aquinas (1225–74; Tommaso d'Aquino in Italian, Tomás de Aquino in Spanish), an Italian Dominican friar and Doctor of the Church. This surname is also common in the Philippines. See also 2 below, compare De Aquino .
Italian: habitational name from a place called Aquino (see   D'Aquino  ), the place where the theologian (see 1 above) was born.

nameMeanings.name: Sibylle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philippe, Alain, Etienne, Jean-Michael.
French: from the female personal name Sibille, from Greek Sibylla (see Sibley ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sibylle d'Aquino Reine de Sicile was born in 1153, in Rome, Roma, Lazio, Italy, her father, Rinaldo d'Aquino, was 54 and her mother, Cecilia di Medania, was 28. She had at least 3 sons and 7 daughters with Tancrède de Sicile Roi de Sicile. She died in 1205, in France, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibylle d'Aquino Reine de Sicile est née en 1153, à Roma, Rome, Lazio, Italie, son père, Rinaldo d'Aquino, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Cecilia di Medania, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles avec Tancrède de Sicile Roi de Sicile. Elle est décédée en 1205, à France, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibylle d'Aquino Reine de Sicile 1153 in Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rinaldo d'Aquino 54 und ihre Mutter Cecilia di Medania 28. Sie hatte mit Tancrède de Sicile Roi de Sicile mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1205 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibylle d'Aquino Reine de Sicile è nata il nel 1153 nel Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italia, sua padre, Rinaldo d'Aquino, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Cecilia di Medania, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie con Tancrède de Sicile Roi de Sicile. Morì nel 1205, nel Francia, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibylle d'Aquino Reine de Sicileが1153年にイタリアラズオロマロマで生まれた時，父Rinaldo d'Aquinoは54歳，母Cecilia di Medaniaは28歳であった。彼女はTancrède de Sicile Roi de Sicileとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1205年にフランスで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibylle d'Aquino Reine de Sicile(이)가 1153년 이탈리아 라지오 로마 로마에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rinaldo d'Aquino(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecilia di Medania(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Tancrède de Sicile Roi de Sicile(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1205년 프랑스에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibylle d'Aquino Reine de Sicile nasceu em 1153, em Roma, Roma, Lazio, Itália, seu pai, Rinaldo d'Aquino, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia di Medania, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas com Tancrède de Sicile Roi de Sicile. Ela faleceu em 1205, em França, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibylle d'Aquino Reine de Sicile родилась в 1153 г. в местности Рим, рома, лазио, Италия, её отцу по имени Rinaldo d'Aquino было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Cecilia di Medania, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей от Tancrède de Sicile Roi de Sicile. Она умерла в 1205 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sibylle d'Aquino Reine de Sicile nació en 1153, en Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italia, su papá, Rinaldo d'Aquino, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Cecilia di Medania, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas con Tancrède de Sicile Roi de Sicile. Murió en 1205, en Francia, a la edad de 52 años.
